themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "And it came to pass after this, that the king of the children of Ammon died, and Hanun his so...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".
